# WROX — MCP Server for Roblox Studio

> WROX is an MCP server that lets AI coding agents (Claude, Codex,
> Cursor, Gemini) control a live Roblox Studio session — create and edit scripts,
> instances, terrain, lighting, assets, audio, and animations via natural language.

## What it does

WROX provides a real-time bridge between AI agents and the Roblox
Studio DataModel. It exposes the full Roblox API surface as executable MCP tools,
so AI can directly create, read, modify, and delete instances, scripts, properties,
terrain, and more — inside a live Studio session.

- Action-based MCP tools covering the full Roblox Studio API surface
- Bidirectional project sync between Roblox Studio and local files (Pro)
- Automated playtest: AI starts/stops Play/Run, injects test scripts, collects logs
- Web dashboard: monitor AI actions, tool history, sync state, and changelog in real time at `http://localhost:3002`
- Multi-place support (up to 3 places simultaneously)
- Roblox Explorer VSCode extension for browsing Studio hierarchy
- Works with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex CLI, Codex Desktop, Gemini CLI, Antigravity

## Installation

**Web installer** (recommended one-click setup for Chrome, Edge, and Arc):

https://hope1026.github.io/weppy-roblox-mcp/installer/

**One-line install** (advanced fallback):

```bash
# macOS / Linux
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/main/install.sh | bash

# Windows (PowerShell)
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

Safari / Firefox users should follow the installer page guide or open the installation docs.

Manual alternative:
1. Install Roblox Studio plugin via the installation guide
2. Register MCP server: `npx -y @weppy/roblox-mcp`

## Tiers

- Basic (Free): MCP tool execution + one-way Studio -> Local sync
- Pro: Bidirectional sync, bulk actions, terrain generation, spatial analysis, multi-place support, advanced tools

- Full documentation: [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/blob/main/llms-full.txt)

- Pro upgrade: https://github.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/blob/main/docs/en/pro-upgrade.md

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 18
- Roblox Studio (Windows 10+ or macOS 12+)
- Any MCP-compatible AI client

## Optional

- Roblox Explorer VSCode extension (browse synced instance tree)
- Pro subscription for bidirectional sync and advanced tools

- GitHub: https://github.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp
